## 📰 Hacker News Highlights / 黑客新闻精选

<!-- [Title-Only] -->
### Simple self-distillation improves code generation

* Based on the title alone, this article likely discusses a method where a code-generating AI model is trained using its own outputs or refined predictions, in order to improve coding performance. “Self-distillation” usually refers to a model learning from itself in a simplified or iterative way, so the paper probably explores a lightweight training technique that boosts code generation quality without requiring a much larger teacher model.
* This could be interesting to readers because code generation is a major practical use case for AI, and a “simple” improvement method suggests the approach may be efficient, scalable, and easier to apply in real-world systems. It may also offer insights into how smaller training tweaks can meaningfully improve programming accuracy or reliability.

### 简单的自蒸馏可提升代码生成能力

* 仅根据标题推测，这篇文章可能讨论一种用于提升代码生成效果的方法：让模型利用自身生成的结果或进一步优化后的预测来训练自己。“自蒸馏”通常指模型以某种简化或迭代的方式向自己学习，因此这篇论文大概是在研究一种较轻量的训练策略，从而在不依赖更大教师模型的情况下提升代码生成质量。
* 这对读者来说可能很有吸引力，因为代码生成是 AI 非常重要的实际应用场景之一，而标题中的“简单”意味着这种改进方法可能更高效、更容易扩展，也更适合落地到真实系统中。同时，它也可能说明：即使只是训练流程上的小调整，也能明显提升编程任务中的准确性与可靠性。

**[Read Original / 阅读原文](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01193)**

### German Military Permit Rule for Men Staying Abroad

* Germany’s new military service law, effective from January 2026, requires men aged 18 to 46 to obtain Bundeswehr approval before staying abroad for more than three months.
* Officials say the rule is mainly for tracking eligible men in case of war, and permits must generally be granted since military service remains voluntary; no clear penalties for violations have been specified.

### 德国男性长期出国需申请军事许可

* 德国自2026年1月起实施新的兵役法，规定18岁至46岁的男性如果离境超过三个月，必须提前获得联邦国防军相关职业中心的批准。
* 官方表示，这项规定主要是为了在战争情况下掌握长期居住海外男性的人数；由于目前兵役仍以自愿为原则，许可通常都会获批，且违规后果目前也未明确。

**[Read Original / 阅读原文](https://www.dw.com/en/german-men-need-military-permit-for-extended-stays-abroad/a-76662677)**

### TurboQuant WASM: Browser and Node.js Vector Quantization with WASM SIMD
* `turboquant-wasm` is an experimental WASM build of TurboQuant for browsers and Node.js, based on the TurboQuant paper and original Zig implementation, with embedded WASM distributed via npm.
* Key additions include relaxed SIMD acceleration, SIMD-vectorized QJL packing/unpacking, a TypeScript API (`init`, `encode`, `decode`, `dot`), and golden-value tests ensuring byte-identical results with the reference implementation.
* The library targets fast vector compression and similarity workloads such as vector search, image similarity, and 3D Gaussian Splatting compression, while supporting direct dot-product computation on compressed data.
* It offers roughly **4.5 bits per dimension** and about **6x compression**, with quality focused on preserving inner products and reducing MSE as vector dimensions increase.
* Minimum runtime support includes Chrome 114+, Firefox 128+, Safari 18+, and Node.js 20+, and building the project requires Zig 0.15.2 and Bun.

### TurboQuant WASM：面向浏览器与 Node.js 的 WASM SIMD 向量量化库
* `turboquant-wasm` 是 TurboQuant 的实验性 WASM 版本，面向浏览器和 Node.js，基于 TurboQuant 论文及其原始 Zig 实现，并通过 npm 提供内嵌 WASM 包。
* 主要增强包括 relaxed SIMD 加速、QJL 打包/解包与缩放的 SIMD 向量化、TypeScript API（`init`、`encode`、`decode`、`dot`），以及保证与参考实现字节级一致的 golden-value 测试。
* 该库适用于向量检索、图像相似度计算和 3D Gaussian Splatting 压缩等场景，并支持**无需解码即可直接计算点积**。
* 在压缩效率方面，其有效载荷约为**每维 4.5 比特**，压缩率约 **6 倍**；同时重点优化内积保持能力，并随着维度增长降低均方误差（MSE）。
* 运行环境最低要求为 Chrome 114+、Firefox 128+、Safari 18+ 和 Node.js 20+；如需构建项目，则需要 Zig 0.15.2 和 Bun。

**[Read Original / 阅读原文](https://github.com/teamchong/turboquant-wasm)**


## 🔥 GitHub Trending / GitHub 热门项目

### mlx-vlm - MLX-based Vision-Language inference and fine-tuning toolkit for Mac

* **What it does**
  * Runs vision-language and omni models on macOS using **MLX**, with support for **inference**, **fine-tuning**, and serving models through CLI, Python, Gradio UI, and FastAPI.
  * Handles multimodal inputs including **images**, **audio**, and even multi-input workflows such as image+audio chat.

* **Key features**
  * Supports **Vision Language Models (VLMs)** and **omni models** with audio/video-oriented capabilities.
  * Multiple usage modes: **CLI**, **Python API**, **Gradio chat UI**, and **OpenAI-compatible FastAPI server**.
  * Advanced capabilities like **multi-image chat**, **vision feature caching**, **TurboQuant KV cache**, and **thinking budget** controls for reasoning models.
  * Broad model coverage with dedicated docs for models such as **DeepSeek-OCR, Phi-4 Multimodal, MiniCPM-o, Gemma 4, Moondream3**, and more.
  * Includes options for **quantization** and adapter-based loading, which are useful for efficient local deployment on Apple hardware.

* **Why it's notable**
  * It stands out as a practical way to run and tune **multimodal AI locally on Macs**, which is increasingly appealing for privacy, speed, and on-device experimentation.
  * The project is trending because it combines **strong multimodal support**, **developer-friendly interfaces**, and **Mac-native MLX optimization** in one package.
  * Its support for OpenAI-style endpoints makes it especially attractive for developers who want to swap local VLM backends into existing apps with minimal changes.

### mlx-vlm - 基于 MLX 的 Mac 端视觉语言模型推理与微调工具

* **功能介绍**
  * 这是一个基于 **MLX** 的多模态 AI 工具包，可在 **Mac** 上运行视觉语言模型和 Omni 模型，支持 **推理、微调、部署服务** 等用途。
  * 可处理 **图像、音频** 等输入，也支持图像+音频等多模态交互场景。

* **主要特点**
  * 支持 **VLM（视觉语言模型）** 以及更丰富输入形式的 **Omni 模型**。
  * 提供多种使用方式：**命令行 CLI、Python API、Gradio 聊天界面、FastAPI 服务端**。
  * 具备不少进阶功能，如 **多图对话、视觉特征缓存、TurboQuant KV Cache、思考预算（thinking budget）** 等。
  * 支持的模型范围较广，并为多个热门模型提供了专门文档，例如 **DeepSeek-OCR、Phi-4 Multimodal、MiniCPM-o、Gemma 4、Moondream3** 等。
  * 支持 **量化**、**adapter 加载** 和本地服务化部署，比较适合 Apple Silicon 设备上的高效运行。

* **为何值得关注**
  * 它让开发者能够更方便地在 **Mac 本地运行和微调多模态模型**，兼顾隐私性、响应速度和本地实验能力。
  * 近期受到关注，主要因为它把 **Mac 原生 MLX 生态** 与 **多模态模型支持**、**开发者友好接口** 结合得很好。
  * 同时提供 **兼容 OpenAI 风格的 API 接口**，降低了把本地多模态模型接入现有应用的门槛。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/Blaizzy/mlx-vlm)**
